# Copilot Instructions for queeromaha.com

## Build, Test, and Lint

This project uses **Bun** as the Node interpreter and package manager. Install dependencies:

```bash
bun install --development
```

### Running Tests

```bash
# Run all tests (unit + E2E)
bun test

# Run only unit tests
bun test test/site.test.js

# Run only E2E tests
bunx playwright test

# Run a single E2E test file
bunx playwright test test/e2e/site.spec.js

# Run tests for a specific page
bunx playwright test -g "home page"
```

### Build and Serve

```bash
# Local development with hot reload
bun run serve        # 11ty server at localhost:8080
bun run serve:cms    # Decap CMS at http://localhost:8080/admin

# Production build
bun run build        # Outputs to _site/
```

### Linting and Formatting

```bash
# Check formatting (only staged files via Husky)
bun run lint

# Auto-fix formatting across entire repo
bun run lint:fix

# Prettier is the formatter; Husky hooks require lint to pass on pre-commit
```

**Code Style**: Prettier (with TOML plugin support). Markdown linting is configured but relaxed (see `.markdownlint.json`).

## High-Level Architecture

This is an **11ty-based static site generator** that serves as a curated directory of queer/trans groups, venues, and spaces in Omaha. Content is primarily markdown files managed through Decap CMS.

### Directory Structure

- **`src/`** — Source files
  - `*.md` — Top-level markdown files become site pages (home, about, music, cafes, art, makers, contact)
  - `_data/` — JSON data files (footerMessages.json, tagMap.json) for shared, reusable data
  - `_includes/` — Layout templates (base.njk and other Nunjucks layouts)
  - `css/` — Stylesheets
  - `admin/` — Decap CMS configuration
  - `src.11tydata.cjs` — 11ty computed data for all pages in src/
- **`test/`** — Tests
  - `site.test.js` — Unit tests (data validation, front matter checks, build smoke tests)
  - `e2e/` — Playwright E2E tests (page loads, navigation, console errors)
- **`_site/`** — Build output (git-ignored); generated by 11ty
- **`migrations/`** — Database migrations (for Decap CMS)
- **`netlify.toml`** — Netlify deployment config (runs `bun run build`)

### Content Model

Each markdown file in `src/` represents a page. Front matter defines metadata:

```yaml
---
title: Page Title
layout: layouts/base.njk
permalink: /page-path/
public: true/false
items: []
---
```

**Front Matter Fields**:

- `title` — Required; page title (enforced by tests)
- `layout` — Template file (typically `layouts/base.njk`)
- `permalink` — URL path; `false` disables page generation
- `public` — If `false`, excludes from collections (content hidden from listings)
- `items` — Array of content items (see Content Items below)

**Content Items** are structured objects in the `items` array:

- **Section Item** (`type: section`): Groups of items
  - `label` — Section heading
  - `id` — Unique identifier
- **Item** (`type: item`): Individual listings
  - `name` — Item name
  - `description` — Short description
  - `links` — Array of `{ label, url }` objects
  - `notes` — Markdown-formatted additional details
  - `public` — If `false`, hides from listings (defaults to `true` if not in section, else inherits section visibility)

**Tags**: Items can have tags that map to emoji labels via `src/_data/tagMap.json`. Tags are applied and rendered using the tag map.

### Data Files

- **`footerMessages.json`** — Array of motivational messages displayed in footer; must have a `messages` array with `text` properties
- **`tagMap.json`** — Object mapping tag IDs to `{ emoji, label }` for visual tagging of locations/groups

### Build and Deployment

- **Local build**: `bun run build` outputs to `_site/`
- **Deployment**: Automatic on push to main via Netlify (runs `bun run build`)
- **11ty config** (`.eleventy.js`):
  - Input: `src/`
  - Output: `_site/`
  - Pass-through copies: `src/css/`, `src/admin/`, `img/`
  - Custom markdown filter for rendering inline markdown in templates

### Link Handling

External links (not starting with `/` or `#`) automatically get `rel="noopener noreferrer"` applied by 11ty's markdown library customization in `.eleventy.js`.

## Key Conventions

### Markdown Front Matter

- All pages **must** have a `title` field in front matter (validated by unit tests)
- Front matter must start on line 1 with `---` and close with `---`

### Content Organization

- **Top-level pages** — Add a new `.md` file in `src/` and set a `permalink`
- **Grouped items** — Use `items` array with `type: section` and `type: item` objects
- **Visibility control** — Set `public: false` to hide from collections; use `public: false` on individual items to hide specific listings

### Testing Requirements

Before committing, ensure:

1. **Unit tests pass**: `bun test test/site.test.js`
   - Validates front matter structure
   - Checks data file integrity (footerMessages, tagMap)
   - Smoke test: 11ty builds successfully
2. **E2E tests pass**: `bunx playwright test`
   - All pages load with correct HTTP status and titles
   - Navigation elements are present and visible
   - No console errors on pages

Husky enforces linting on pre-commit and tests on pre-push.

### Formatting

- **Prettier** with TOML support enforces consistent formatting
- Lint-staged runs Prettier on staged files at pre-commit
- Manual fix: `bun run lint:fix`

### Data Validation

- `footerMessages.json` must have `messages` array with non-empty `text` fields
- `tagMap.json` must be a non-empty object where each value has `emoji` and `label` strings

### Markdown Lint

Markdown linting is configured but relaxed (see `.markdownlint.json`). Most rules are disabled except basic structure checks.

## Notes

- **Bun vs Node**: This project uses Bun as the primary runtime. Install with `bun install`, not `npm install`.
- **CMS**: Decap CMS allows editing content via `/admin` (locally or on deployed site).
- **Volta**: Node version is pinned to 24.15.0 via `volta` in package.json.
- **Minimum release age**: Bun is configured to only install packages published at least 3 days ago (see `bunfig.toml`).
